# Tech Rig

> Trucking compliance and truck dispatch for owner-operators and fleets across the United States. Tech Rig gets new carriers road-legal and keeps trucks loaded: one team for the whole journey, from the first filing to the next load.

DGR Tech Rig LLC is officially listed by FMCSA as a BOC-3 blanket process-agent company. Tech Rig is not a government agency and is not affiliated with or endorsed by FMCSA.

## Compliance and setup
- [Compliance services](https://techrig.org/compliance-services/): the full setup hub, from company formation to active operating authority.
- [Authority package (DOT + MC)](https://techrig.org/mc-dot-registration/): USDOT and MC operating authority filed together.
- [USDOT registration](https://techrig.org/dot-registration/): get your USDOT number filed correctly.
- [MC authority](https://techrig.org/mc-registration/): interstate operating authority and the 21-day federal protest period.
- [BOC-3 filing](https://techrig.org/boc-3-filing/): one-time blanket process-agent designation.
- [UCR registration](https://techrig.org/ucr-registration/): annual Unified Carrier Registration with the correct fleet bracket.
- [MCS-150 update](https://techrig.org/mcs-150-biennial-update/): biennial update and reactivation.
- [IRP registration](https://techrig.org/irp-registration/): apportioned plates for interstate operation.
- [IFTA registration](https://techrig.org/ifta-registration/): fuel-tax account, decals, and quarterly filing.
- [Driver qualification files](https://techrig.org/driver-qualification-files/): DQ file setup and upkeep.
- [Drug and alcohol consortium](https://techrig.org/drug-and-alcohol-consortium/): consortium enrollment and testing program.
- [FMCSA Clearinghouse](https://techrig.org/fmcsa-clearinghouse-registration/): Clearinghouse registration.
- [ELD services](https://techrig.org/eld-services/): electronic logging device setup.
- [Insurance filing](https://techrig.org/trucking-insurance-filing/): coordinating your FMCSA insurance filing.
- [Trucking LLC](https://techrig.org/trucking-llc/): company formation.

## Dispatch
- [Truck dispatch](https://techrig.org/services/): load finding, rate negotiation, and paperwork, no long-term contract and no forced dispatch.
- [Box truck dispatch](https://techrig.org/box-truck-dispatch/): the box truck franchise dispatch service.
- [Reefer dispatch](https://techrig.org/reefers-trucking/): temperature-controlled freight.
- [Flatbed dispatch](https://techrig.org/flatbed-dispatch/): open-deck freight.
- [Dry van dispatch](https://techrig.org/dry-van-trucking/): general palletized freight.
- [Power only dispatch](https://techrig.org/power-only-trucking/): pulling trailers others supply.
- [Hot shot dispatch](https://techrig.org/hot-shot-trucking/): expedited loads on a dually and gooseneck.

## Guides
- [How to start a trucking company](https://techrig.org/how-to-start-a-trucking-company/): the step-by-step setup guide.

## Company
- [About Tech Rig](https://techrig.org/about-us/): who we are and our track record.
- [Contact](https://techrig.org/contact-us/): phone +1 917-909-2257, email info@techrig.org.
